description_long: This is a classic black and white police car with a four-door sedan body style, featuring a prominent roof-mounted light bar with red, blue, and white segments. The vehicle has black body panels with white doors, each displaying a police badge insignia. The windows are tinted dark, and the wheels are standard with silver hubcaps. The front and rear bumpers are robust, and the car has side mirrors on both doors. The rear of the car includes a visible license plate and red tail lights, while the front has a wide grille and headlights.
description: A black and white four-door police car with a roof light bar, police insignia on the doors, and tinted windows.
description_view_0: Rear view showing red tail lights, a license plate, and the roof light bar.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the white door with a police badge, side mirror, and the full length of the light bar.
description_view_2: Front view highlighting the wide grille, headlights, and the roof light bar.
description_view_3: Right side view with a white door, police badge, side mirror, and the light bar visible.
attribute_police_markings: White doors with a black police badge insignia on both front doors. No visible text such as 'POLICE' or department names. The rest of the car is black, with no additional stripes or checkers.
attribute_emergency_lights: A roof-mounted light bar with red, blue, and white segments, rectangular in shape and centrally placed.
attribute_police_insignia: A black and white police badge insignia is visible on both front doors.
attribute_license_plate: A white license plate is visible on the rear of the vehicle, but the text is not legible.
